task_completion.description: Verify the channel is created with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: NextGen Connect Administrator GUI shows a channel named 'Canonical_XML_Transformer' in the Channels list.

task_completion.description: Verify the source connector is configured to listen on the correct port.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Source tab for the channel shows the connector type as 'TCP Listener' (or similar MLLP listener) with the port set to '6661'.

task_completion.description: Verify the destination connector is configured to write to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Destinations tab shows a 'File Writer' connector with the Directory set to '/home/ga/xml_out/' or '/home/ga/xml_out'.

task_completion.description: Verify the XML transformation and mapping logic is configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Transformers or Scripts section shows mapping logic extracting PID-3.1, PID-5.1, PID-5.2, EVN-2, and gender, OR an XML template matching the required <PatientEvent> structure with variable substitutions.

task_completion.description: Verify the channel has been deployed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NextGen Connect Dashboard shows the 'Canonical_XML_Transformer' channel in a 'Deployed' or 'Started' state.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the NextGen Connect Administrator GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the actual NextGen Connect Java GUI (Mirth Connect), not just terminal commands or text editors.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not hardcode the test MRNs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Transformation scripts or templates use HL7 message variables (e.g., msg['PID']) rather than hardcoded strings like 'TEST_M_999' or 'TEST_F_888'.

integrity.description: Verify the XML template is properly constructed in the destination settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The File Writer template field contains the actual XML structure with variable substitutions, rather than a static pre-written file path.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Channel Name: Canonical_XML_Transformer. Listen Port: 6661 (TCP/MLLP). Output Directory: /home/ga/xml_out. Test MRNs used for verification: TEST_M_999 (male) and TEST_F_888 (female).
